original_abstract: In recent years, the synthesis of nanoparticles has pivoted toward green nanotechnology, driven by an urgent need for sustainable production methods. This shift is motivated by the prohibitive costs and environmental concerns associated with traditional physical and chemical synthesis techniques, necessitating the development of more efficient and eco-friendly alternatives.
humanized_abstract: During the past few years, the production of nanoparticles is shifted towards green nanotechnology due to urgent need to provide cost and environmentally effective production method, because of high costs and environmentally harmful physical and chemical synthesis methods of nanomaterials.

document.output: During the past few years, the production of nanoparticles is shifted towards green nanotechnology due to urgent need to provide cost and environmentally effective production method, because of high costs and environmentally harmful physical and chemical synthesis methods of nanomaterials.
